description: Country metadata baseline scaffold aligned with UN DESA EGDI and World Bank socioeconomic indicators.
source: UN DESA e-Government Data Center (https://publicadministration.un.org/egovkb/en-us/Data-Center) and World Bank Data/Indicators (https://data.worldbank.org/).

meta.evaluator: Baseline synthesis (World Bank + UNDP + UN DESA repositories)
meta.notes: Baseline metadata synthesized from repository snapshots (World Bank/UNDP) and UN DESA EGDI indicators; validate before scoring.
